title: Crispy Norwegian Flatbread
description: A simple, crispy flatbread originating from Norway. Perfect as a snack or side dish.
instructions: 1. In a large mixing bowl, combine rye flour and salt.
2. Gradually add water and mix until a dough forms.
3. Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until smooth and elastic.
4. Cover the dough with plastic wrap and let rest for 30 minutes.
5. Preheat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium-high heat.
6. Divide the dough into 4-6 equal pieces, depending on desired flatbread size.
7. Roll out each piece into a thin circle, about 1/8 inch thick.
8. Cook the flatbreads in the skillet for 1-2 minutes on each side, until crispy and golden.
9. Brush with peppery flatbread seasoning for added flavor.
